ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_reserves" (
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for reserve entries */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Combined datetime for precise indexing */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the recorded data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the recorded data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the recorded data */,
  "oil_reserves" REAL /* Quantity of oil reserves in barrels */,
  "gas_reserves" REAL /* Quantity of gas reserves in cubic meters */,
  "renewable_reserves" REAL /* Quantity of renewable energy reserves in megawatt-hours */,
  "renewable_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy (e.g., solar, wind, hydro) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was recorded */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reserve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reserves_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low oil, low gas) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email to notify when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert checks (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "energy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type (e.g., Oil, Gas, Renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy type (e.g., barrels, cubic meters, megawatt-hours) */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the energy type is renewable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reserve_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for the forecast */,
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy type being forecasted */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "forecast_month" INTEGER /* Month for the forecast */,
  "forecast_day" INTEGER /* Day for the forecast */,
  "forecast_hour" INTEGER /* Hour for the forecast */,
  "predicted_reserves" REAL /* Predicted reserves for the specified year */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 80%, 90%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reserve_forecasts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reserve_forecasts_energy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("energy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the facility in barrels or cubic meters */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the facility (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of storage facility (e.g., tank, pipeline, reservoir) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_reserves" (
  "facility_reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility reserve entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Combined datetime for precise indexing */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storage facility */,
  "oil_reserves" REAL /* Quantity of oil stored at the facility */,
  "gas_reserves" REAL /* Quantity of gas stored at the facility */,
  "renewable_reserves" REAL /* Quantity of renewable energy stored at the facility */,
  "renewable_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy (e.g., solar, wind, hydro) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_reserve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reserves_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES storage_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_generation" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the generated report in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup entry */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date the backup was performed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the backup data */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the backup data in MB */,
  "backup_type" TEXT /* Type of backup (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "backup_status" TEXT /* Status of the backup (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the backup process in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
